behaviorDifference: The shadow TaskFrame now resolves plural, specific-item and prior-composition references, distinguishes explicit, conversation-inherited and system-default constraints, and asks one relevant question only for result- or tool-changing ambiguity. The legacy deterministic execution path remains authoritative.
knownLimitations: The phase-4 dataset is an offline contract set rather than production traffic.
Context resolution consumes structured prior TaskFrames or validated legacy query snapshots; raw free-form transcript recovery remains delegated to the bounded semantic parser.
Candidate-parallel retrieval is represented by policy but is not executed until phase 5 planning.
rollback: Revert 8be6c2f. Context resolution is attached to the semantic shadow result and requires no production data rollback.
